news.t: NEUBERGER BERMAN EXPANDS ACTIVELY MANAGED ETF LINEUP WITH CONVERSION OF GREATER CHINA EQUITY FUND & GLOBAL REAL ESTATE FUND

holdings.infoBox: NBCE is an equity ETF with a total of 74 individual holdings. The top holdings are Yuan Renminbi Offshore stock at 56.43%, Contemporary Amperex Technology at 4.07%, Zhongji Innolight at 4.01%, Montage Technology at 3.78%, and Chaozhou Three-Circle (Group) at 3.54%.

overview.description: The Neuberger China Equity ETF (NBCE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, concentrated, all-cap portfolio of China-A share companies and equity-related securities. The fund also incorporates ESG factors as part of its screening process  NBCE was launched on Jul 17, 2013 and is issued by Neuberger Berman.

data.title: NEUBERGER BERMAN EXPANDS ACTIVELY MANAGED ETF LINEUP WITH CONVERSION OF GREATER CHINA EQUITY FUND & GLOBAL REAL ESTATE FUND
